PG5.text: When a business owner calls the bank, everyone blames someone else.

PG5.text: This is why a short wire to China turns into a week of finger-pointing.

PG5.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective)
PG5.text: Every week a business owner calls the bank, and nobody owns the shortfall.

PG5.template: If you're a (insert target audience) and you want (insert dream result) by (insert avenue), then listen to this video
PG5.text: If a business owner sources from China, this bank phone call is familiar.

PG5.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point)
PG5.text: Business owners getting suppliers paid in full, without the blame-game phone calls.

PG5.template: Here's what every (audience) needs to know about (topic).
PG5.text: Here's what every importer needs to know about the bank blame-game phone call.

Picture this phone call. You wired 50K to China. Your supplier got 48K. You call the bank. They blame the middle bank. The middle bank blames the receiving bank. Nobody owns it. We have all been on that call. Let us walk through how to skip it.
